docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT KING, STEPHEN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-12-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT KING, STEPHEN HEARING SET FOR APR-12-2010 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT STEPHEN KING'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 5 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WISE, REGINALD AS TO DEFENDANT KING, STEPHEN SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-12-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
LAW AND MOTION, 301, DEFENDANT STEPHEN KING'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR IN LIGHT OF RULING ON DEMURRER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT KING, STEPHEN HEARING SET FOR APR-12-2010 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
